FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: AI Detects Support at MA20 as Fundamentals Turn Bullish
tldr_points: US data optimism and Iran de‑escalation boost risk appetite, favoring USD/JPY upside.
Price holds above the 20‑day MA at 158.30, signalling near‑term bullish momentum.
Key resistance lies near 160.50; a break could target 161.80.
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY holds above MA20 on USA optimistic data and Iran de‑escalation supporting risk appetite and targeting 160.50 now.
FX.comment: Bullish setup supported by price above MA20, rising US yields and risk‑on sentiment from Iran de‑escalation.

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] UP: AI Detects Support at MA20 as Fundamentals Turn Bullish
tldr_points: S&P 500 trades above the 20‑day moving average, signalling short‑term bullish momentum.
Premium consumer spending strength and Nvidia’s debt‑free status provide fundamental tailwinds.
Barclays’ price‑target increase on F5 adds sector‑specific upside bias.
STOCKS.excerpt: S&P 500 above MA20 buoyed by premium consumer spending, Nvidia strength, and Barclays PT raise, pointing to term upside.
STOCKS.comment: Bullish setup supported by price above MA20 and positive fundamental catalysts.

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] DOWN: AI Detects Resistance at MA20 as Fundamentals Turn Bearish
tldr_points: Regulatory headwinds intensify with SEC suit and Trump‑linked legislation risk.
Bridge exploit and Circle freeze raise counterparty‑risk concerns across DeFi.
Price remains below the 20‑day MA, signaling near‑term bearish momentum.
CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC/USD faces bearish pressure from regulatory news, on‑chain exploits, and technical resistance at MA20.
CRYPTO.comment: Price below MA20 with bearish fundamentals and negative sentiment
